app.title: My Crosses Diary
app.subtitle: Daily Task and Habit Tracker
app.welcomeDesc: This system helps you build consistency in a very visual way. Each day of the month is an interactive cell. You can mark an entire day as completed in two ways:
app.welcomeMethod1Desc: to open its details in the sidebar, where you can mark the individual tasks from your template. Completing them all will automatically mark the day with a cross (✕)!
app.welcomeMethod2Desc: (in the side details card, or by hovering over the day in the calendar) to instantly cross out the entire day as fulfilled.
app.welcomePrivacy: 💡 Your data is stored 100% privately in your browser. You can export a copy from the panel below.
app.demoNoteYesterday: Yesterday was a great day of absolute focus!
app.demoNoteTwoDaysAgo: Completed everything on time before dinner.

details.title: Day details
details.dayCompletedDesc: You have marked this day as successful. The tasks are fulfilled.
details.pendingDesc: Check the tasks below or cross out the entire day with a cross.
details.noTasksDesc: Add fixed tasks to your daily template below.

template.title: Daily Template
template.description: Define the tasks you want to complete each day. Days will be marked with a cross ✕ when you complete all these tasks.
template.noTasks: You have no tasks in your template
template.noTasksDesc: Add one above or select a suggested one.

backup.title: Data & Backups
backup.heading: Backups
backup.description: Download your historical progress or restore a previous backup so you don't lose your data when changing browsers.
backup.invalidFile: The backup file is not valid.
backup.resetDesc: Deletes all crosses, notes and history.
backup.confirmResetDesc: This action is irreversible and all history of crosses (✕), tasks and notes will be permanently deleted.

validation.invalidJson: The file does not contain a valid JSON object.
validation.invalidTemplate: One of the templates has an invalid format.
validation.templateMissingFields: A template is missing required fields (id, text, createdAt).
validation.invalidDate: Invalid date in logs: "{{date}}" (must be YYYY-MM-DD).
validation.invalidLog: The log for day "{{date}}" has an invalid format.
validation.invalidCompleted: The "completed" field for day "{{date}}" is not boolean.
validation.invalidTasks: The "tasks" field for day "{{date}}" is not an array.
validation.noData: The file contains no templates or logs data.

stats.streakAdvice: Keep the day's cross active so you don't lose the fire.
stats.recordAdvice: Your longest compliance streak so far.

feedback.start_title: One step at a time, you can do it!
feedback.start_desc: Start marking days with a cross (X) on your calendar.
feedback.extraordinary_desc: You're mastering your habits this month. Keep shining!
feedback.consistency_desc: You've passed the middle of the month. Keep the fire going!
feedback.progress_desc: You're building discipline day by day. Don't stop!
feedback.goodStart_desc: Consistency is key, keep marking crosses.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: The application encountered an unexpected error.
